exercises.title: Multi-Solution Grover
exercises.description: Run Grover's with multiple solutions and verify iteration formula.
exercises.starterCode:
import numpy as np

# Implement Grover with k solutions
exercises.solution:
import numpy as np

N, k = 64, 4
iters = int(np.pi/4 * np.sqrt(N/k))
print(f'N={N}, k={k}: {iters} iterations')
